alpha.label: Alpha
alpha.disclaimer: This feature is in early access. Functionality may change, and some operations may not work as expected. Not recommended for production use without testing.

mcp.title: Direct your AI agent here

approval.title: Test the approval flow
approval.description: Send a sandbox approval push to your own Breeze Mobile devices. Tapping the push will take over your phone with the approval screen for 60 seconds. Approving or denying does not run any real action — it's purely for testing.
approval.sendTitle: Send a test approval to your phone
approval.sendDescription: We'll deliver a push within a few seconds. The approval expires automatically after 60 seconds if you don't act on it.
approval.send: Send test approval to my phone
approval.sent: Sent. Check your phone within a few seconds.
approval.delivered: Push delivered to {{sent}} of {{count}} registered devices. The approval expires in 60 seconds.
approval.delivered_one: Push delivered to {{sent}} of {{count}} registered device. The approval expires in 60 seconds.
approval.delivered_other: Push delivered to {{sent}} of {{count}} registered devices. The approval expires in 60 seconds.
approval.noDevices: We don't see a registered Breeze Mobile device on your account. Sign in to the app at least once, then try again.
approval.tip: Tip: this page is safe to share with App Store reviewers. They can sign in with the provided test account, click the button, and verify the approval takeover end-to-end.

errors.send: We could not send a test approval. Please try again.

deletion.title: Delete your account
deletion.description: Submitting a deletion request notifies an administrator on your organization. Your account will be processed and removed within 30 days. You can cancel any time before then.
deletion.warningTitle: This is a request, not an immediate deletion.
deletion.warningDescription: Once submitted, an admin from your organization is notified by email. Your account will be processed within 30 days. You can sign in and cancel any time before then.
deletion.reasonPlaceholder: Help us improve — what made you decide to leave?
deletion.processedByPrefix: We've notified an administrator on your organization. Your account will be processed by

errors.load: Unable to load your account status. Please refresh.
errors.submit: We could not submit your request. Please try again.
errors.cancel: We could not cancel your request. Please try again.

devices.title: Trusted devices
devices.description: Phones and tablets you've paired with the Breeze mobile app. These devices can approve high-risk MCP requests on your behalf. Revoke any device you no longer use.
devices.emptyDescription: Install the Breeze mobile app and sign in to pair a device. Approvals will then surface on your phone.
devices.revokeDescription: The device's push tokens are wiped immediately and any in-flight approvals will fail. To use the app again you'll need to re-pair from a sign-in.
devices.onlyDeviceTitle: This is your only trusted device.
devices.onlyDeviceDescription: Until you re-pair from a new sign-in, you won't be able to approve anything from your phone.

apps.title: Connected apps
apps.description: AI assistants and other MCP clients (Claude.ai, ChatGPT, Cursor, …) you've authorized to act on your behalf. Revoke access at any time — tokens stop working within 10 minutes.
apps.emptyDescription: When you authorize a Claude.ai chat, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any other MCP client, it will appear here so you can revoke it later.
apps.revokedToast: {{app}} access revoked. Tokens stop working within 10 minutes.
apps.revokeDescription: All grants and refresh tokens for this client will be wiped. Tokens stop working within 10 minutes. You'll need to re-authorize the next time you use it.
apps.onlyAppTitle: This is your only authorized app.
apps.onlyAppDescription: After revoking, you'll need to re-authorize before any AI assistant can act on your tenant.

C2CDashboard.alphaDisclaimer: Cloud-to-cloud backup is in early access. Connection setup is available for evaluation, but sync and restore jobs are not yet implemented.
C2CDashboard.title: Cloud-to-Cloud Backup
C2CDashboard.description: Set up cloud connections now; sync and restore execution is still in progress.

empty.connections: No connections configured yet. Click "Add Connection" to get started.
empty.configs: No backup configs yet. Add a connection first, then configure backups.
empty.jobs: No sync jobs have run yet.
empty.items: No items found. Run a sync to populate backup items.

C2CDashboard.syncNotImplemented: Sync jobs are not yet implemented

C2CConnectionWizard.title: Add Cloud Connection
C2CConnectionWizard.selectProvider: Select the cloud provider to back up.
C2CConnectionWizard.oneClickDescription: Your Breeze instance has a pre-configured Microsoft 365 app. Click "Grant Access" to authorize backup access to your M365 tenant. A Global Admin must approve the consent prompt.
C2CConnectionWizard.useOwnAppRegistration: Or use your own app registration
C2CConnectionWizard.reviewGrantAccess: Review and grant access. You will be redirected to Microsoft to authorize the connection.
C2CConnectionWizard.validationUnavailable: Connection validation is not yet available. Save the connection to finish setup.

C2CRestoreDialog.title: Restore Cloud Items
C2CRestoreDialog.description: Search backed-up items now; restore execution is not yet implemented.
C2CRestoreDialog.emptySearch: No backup items matched the current search.
C2CRestoreDialog.restoreOriginalDescription: Use the source connection that originally protected the items.
C2CRestoreDialog.restoreAnotherDescription: Redirect the selected items into a different active cloud target.
C2CRestoreDialog.restoreDisabled: Restore submission is disabled until cloud-to-cloud restore execution is implemented.

ConsentForm.signInDescription: You need to sign in to your Breeze account before authorizing this connection.
ConsentForm.redirectLoopDescription: Your browser sent you back here without a sign-in cookie. Third-party cookies or site storage may be blocked. Allow cookies for this site and try again, or return to your MCP client and start over.
ConsentForm.expiredDescription: This authorization link is no longer valid. Return to your MCP client and start the connection again.
ConsentForm.noTenantsDescription: Your account isn't a member of any partner tenant, so it can't authorize an MCP connection. Ask an administrator to add you to a partner before continuing.
ConsentForm.consentTitle: {{displayName}} wants to access your Breeze tenant
ConsentForm.unverifiedDescription: Breeze has not verified this integration. Its name is self-reported and could impersonate a trusted app. Only approve if you started this connection and recognize the callback destination below.
ConsentForm.callbackLabel: Authorization code will be sent to:
ConsentForm.missingRedirectDescription: This authorization request didn't include a callback destination, so it can't be safely approved. Return to your MCP client and start the connection again.
ConsentForm.revokeHint: You can revoke this access anytime from Settings → Connected apps.
ConsentForm.scopeIntro: This will allow the app to:

scopes.mcpRead: Read your fleet data (devices, alerts, scripts, automations)
scopes.mcpWrite: Make non-destructive changes in your fleet (tags, alerts, configuration)
scopes.mcpExecute: Run high-risk actions on devices (commands, scripts, remote operations)
scopes.offlineAccess: Stay connected without re-signing in (refresh tokens)
